error_signature: null instead of expected object in Set node output
title: Set node outputs null instead of expected object
symptom: The final Set node outputs `null` for the `realtor_data` field instead of the expected realtor object, despite the workflow executing successfully.
applies_when: Using a Set node to format output
Postgres node returns a single object
not_this_if: Postgres node returns an array of objects
Error messages are present in the workflow
root_cause: The expression used in the Set node was attempting to access the first element of an array, but the Postgres node returned a single object instead. This led to the output being null because the expected array index was not valid.
fix_steps: Change the expression to {{ $node[“Get Realtor”].json ?? null }}
agent_instruction: Update the expression in the Set node to access the object directly without indexing.
